plugins.name: WorkBuddy
plugins.description: Tencent CodeBuddy (WorkBuddy) OAuth provider for CLIProxyAPI: multi-account login, dynamic models, chat executor, CN daily check-in, Global one-shot expert trial (manual), credit lifecycle (disable CN / delete Global when exhausted), credits panel with CN/Global filters, optional credits-aware scheduler.
plugins.author: Sliverkiss
